label: Cu
notes: Cu total kappa is ~400 W/mK at 300K; dominated by electrons (~395), phonon contribution small (~5-10)

label: TiN
notes: TiN total kappa ~5-30 W/mK depending on stoichiometry/film quality

label: SiO2
notes: amorphous SiO2 kappa ~1.1-1.4 W/mK; crystalline quartz higher

label: Si3N4
notes: Si3N4 film kappa ~2-30 W/mK depending on deposition

label: HfO2
notes: HfO2 film kappa ~0.5-1.5 W/mK depending on phase and deposition
